bullets: Provides frontline technical support for 3,000+ students and faculty.
Resolves 70+ tickets with a 60% first-contact resolution rate.
Maintains the team's internal knowledge base.
Builds the weekly schedule for a 25-person student team, reducing scheduling conflicts by 45%.

note: TUWIC welcomes students of all genders across majors.
bullets: Leads TUWIC's flagship event, TECH Camp — a weekend camp bringing 20–30 middle school girls to campus to learn coding and explore STEM careers.
Owned all volunteer operations for TECH Camp: recruitment, working-with-minors compliance with Risk Management/HR, shift scheduling, and day-of delegation.
